title: stipa zalesskyi subsp. ucrainica
intro: Stipa zalesskyi subsp. ucrainica, a subspecies of the Stipa zalesskyi plant, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Ukraine and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving coughs and colds, and is also used to treat digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Stipa zalesskyi subsp. ucrainica typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used as tinctures.
